note: Input manifest for sourcing facts. Each topic is pinned to the version actually installed in the app — facts are only worth showing if they are true for the version you are running. Regenerate versions with: pnpm ls --depth 0 --filter <app>
excluded: ESLint, Prettier, lefthook, git — general dev tooling, already familiar

topics.label: React Native
topics.scope: New Architecture (Fabric, TurboModules, JSI, Codegen), Hermes V1, core primitives vs web, flexbox defaults, Platform APIs, shadows, keyboard

topics.label: React 19
topics.scope: ref as prop, use(), Actions, useOptimistic, <Activity>, useEffectEvent, Suspense in RN, React Compiler

topics.label: Expo SDK
topics.scope: config plugins, CNG/prebuild, app.json, EXPO_PUBLIC_ inlining, expo/fetch, expo-doctor, dev builds

topics.label: Expo Router
topics.scope: file routing, Stack/Tabs/NativeTabs, params hooks, typed routes, modals, auth gating; no @react-navigation imports

topics.label: expo-image
topics.scope: contentFit, blurhash/thumbhash, cachePolicy, recyclingKey in lists, prefetch

topics.label: EAS Update
topics.scope: runtimeVersion policies, branch vs channel, useUpdates, rollbacks, what OTA cannot change

topics.label: EAS Build
topics.scope: eas.json profiles, env vars, credentials, local builds, submit, workflows

topics.label: Expo modules
topics.scope: device, font, glass-effect, linking, splash-screen, status-bar, symbols, system-ui, web-browser, constants

topics.label: @expo/ui
topics.scope: SwiftUI/Jetpack Compose native primitives, import paths, modifiers, alpha status

topics.label: NativeWind
topics.scope: v5 vs v4, cssInterop/remapProps, platform + dark variants, the Tailwind subset, rem baseline

topics.label: Tailwind v4
topics.scope: CSS-first config, @theme, @utility, @source, no tailwind.config.js

topics.label: Gluestack UI
topics.scope: own-your-code components, CLI add, provider + tokens

topics.label: TanStack Query
topics.scope: queryOptions, staleTime/gcTime, v5 signature changes, infinite queries, mutations + optimistic, RN focus/online managers

topics.label: Zustand
topics.scope: selectors, useShallow and the v5 snapshot trap, middleware (persist/immer/devtools), slices

topics.label: Valibot
topics.scope: pipe model, safeParse, fallback (invalid vs absent), unions, transforms, to-json-schema

topics.label: FlashList
topics.scope: v2 is estimate-free, recycling, getItemType, useRecyclingState, New-Arch only

topics.label: Reanimated
topics.scope: worklets split into its own package, UI vs JS thread, shared values, layout animations, CSS animations API

topics.label: Gesture Handler
topics.scope: modern Gesture API + GestureDetector, GestureHandlerRootView, composition, worklet callbacks

topics.label: Screens & Safe Area
topics.scope: useSafeAreaInsets vs SafeAreaView, initialWindowMetrics, screen freezing

topics.label: react-native-svg
topics.scope: primitives, SvgXml, animating with Reanimated, sizing

topics.label: TypeScript 6
topics.scope: noUncheckedIndexedAccess in practice, satisfies, const type params, erasableSyntaxOnly, TS6 changes

topics.label: Testing
topics.scope: jest-expo preset, RNTL v14 queries + userEvent, testing TanStack Query, Maestro flows

topics.label: Metro & pnpm
topics.scope: auto-detected workspace root, why disableHierarchicalLookup breaks pnpm, cache, withNativeWind, package exports

topics.label: TMDB API
topics.scope: v3 api_key auth only, append_to_response, image CDN + /configuration, rate limits, session_id writes, attribution

topics.label: Performance
topics.scope: Hermes vs JSC, thread model, profiling, bundle analysis, list perf

topics.label: Config system
topics.scope: two-layer model (bundled defaults + one remote override), safeParse at the boundary, per-field fallback, invalid vs absent, the hardcoded boot floor, _schemaVersion sunsetting, OTA vs remote config

topics.label: Accessibility
topics.scope: accessibilityRole/Label/State, collapsing children, tap targets, reduce-motion, font scaling, focus after navigation

planned.label: React Hook Form
planned.note: add once it is in package.json

planned.label: Sentry
planned.note: error tracking; the config system's onDegraded seam depends on a reporter existing
